info.name: Internship Management System – Complete API Collection
info.description:
Full test collection for the Internship Management System backend.

Setup before running:
1. Start the server: python manage.py runserver
2. In Django admin create at least one Department.
3. Pre-register a student (PreRegisteredStudent) and staff/coordinator/advisor (PreRegisteredStaff).
4. Fill in the collection variables below with real values for your environment.

Full workflow order:
  Student registers → Mentor registers → Coordinator/Advisor register
  → Admin approves company → Company creates position
  → Student applies → Mentor reviews → Coordinator assigns advisor
  → Advisor reviews → Student accepts offer → Mentor starts internship
  → Student checks in/out → Student submits logbook/report
  → Evaluations → Dashboards/Analytics

Tokens are auto-saved by the login and OTP-verify test scripts.

exec: if (pm.response.code === 201) { const j = pm.response.json(); if (j.tokens) { pm.collectionVariables.set('studentAccessToken', j.tokens.access); pm.collectionVariables.set('studentRefreshToken', j.tokens.refresh); pm.collectionVariables.set('accessToken', j.tokens.access); } if (j.user) pm.collectionVariables.set('studentUserPk', j.user.id); }

if (pm.response.code === 200) { const j = pm.response.json(); if (j.tokens) { pm.collectionVariables.set('studentAccessToken', j.tokens.access); pm.collectionVariables.set('studentRefreshToken', j.tokens.refresh); pm.collectionVariables.set('accessToken', j.tokens.access); } }

request.description: Starts ALL NOT_STARTED internships under this position. today >= start_date required.
Sets status=COMPLETED, sums attendance hours. Internship must be ONGOING.
Only allowed if status=NOT_STARTED and today < start_date.

exec: if ([200,201].includes(pm.response.code)) { pm.collectionVariables.set('evaluationId', pm.response.json().id); }

request.description: Returns active internship, attendance summary, reports, evaluations, advisor info, recent notifications.
Returns assigned students, active internships, pending reports, attendance flags.
Returns company internship counts, pending applications, attendance overview, intern summaries.
Returns department students, advisors, internship counts, placement rate, advisor workload.
Returns global stats: user counts by role, companies, positions, internships by status, evaluations.
Returns total placed, placement rate, breakdown by status/department/company/year.
Returns per-company internship counts, completion rate, avg evaluation scores. Sorted by completion rate.
Returns per-department student/advisor counts, internship counts, placement/completion rates.
Coordinator sees only their department's statistics.

item.name: 21 – Permission Smoke Tests

exec: pm.test('401 without token', () => pm.expect(pm.response.code).to.be.oneOf([401, 403]));
pm.test('403 for wrong role', () => pm.expect(pm.response.code).to.be.oneOf([403, 401]));
pm.test('403 student cannot create position', () => pm.expect(pm.response.code).to.be.oneOf([403, 400]));
pm.test('403 mentor cannot access advisor dashboard', () => pm.expect(pm.response.code).to.be.oneOf([403, 401]));
pm.test('403 student cannot access analytics', () => pm.expect(pm.response.code).to.be.oneOf([403, 401]));
pm.test('403 cross-company applicant access', () => pm.expect(pm.response.code).to.be.oneOf([403, 404]));

item.description: Verify that unauthorized access is correctly rejected.

exec: pm.test('No 500 error', () => pm.expect(pm.response.code).to.not.equal(500));
